title: Privacy Amendment (Enhancing Online Privacy) Bill 2025
snippet: The bill strengthens penalties and introduces new rights...
text: This bill strengthens penalties for serious data breaches. It amends the Privacy Act to enhance enforcement and introduces a right to object to profiling. Treasury estimates cost impacts are minor. Media coverage emphasised stronger penalties.

title: Hansard: Question Time on fuel excise relief
snippet: Members debated temporary fuel excise relief...
text: Members debated temporary fuel excise relief and its inflationary effects. The Treasurer cited ABS CPI data. Opposition raised concerns about regional impacts.

title: Minister announces grant program for regional EV chargers
snippet: New funding for regional charging infrastructure...
text: The program funds 300 new chargers across regional Australia. Expected to cut transport emissions. Industry groups welcomed the move.
